name: replyline
description: Replyline — Windows-first tray app для сложных рабочих разговоров (public source beta, RU-first UX).

scripts.test:unit: pnpm test:rust && pnpm test:ui && pnpm test:latency-parser && pnpm test:runtime-answer-quality:unit && pnpm test:product-scenarios:unit && pnpm test:release-freeze-guard
scripts.test:contracts: pnpm test:consistency && pnpm test:doc-links && pnpm test:ipc-contract && pnpm test:locale-keys && pnpm test:prompt-contract && pnpm copy:check
scripts.test:consistency: pnpm test:contracts:docs && pnpm test:contracts:ui && pnpm test:contracts:model && pnpm test:contracts:runtime && pnpm test:contracts:observability && pnpm test:contracts:beta
scripts.rust:deny: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Push-Location src-tauri; cargo deny check --config deny.toml advisories bans sources; $code = $LASTEXITCODE; Pop-Location; exit $code"
scripts.beta:preflight: pnpm runtime:preflight && pnpm probe:runtime && pnpm evidence:bundle
scripts.smoke: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm build && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --check && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:contracts && pnpm test:interview-quality
scripts.verify:fast: pnpm smoke && pnpm test:security-lanes && pnpm test:public-footprint
scripts.verify:standard: pnpm verify:fast && pnpm scripts:lifecycle && pnpm release:freeze:check
scripts.verify:full: pnpm verify:standard && pnpm release:freeze:check:strict && pnpm rust:deps && pnpm audit:npm && pnpm test:runtime-quality && pnpm test:product-scenarios && pnpm report:runtime-quality:strict && pnpm report:interview-quality:strict && pnpm report:release-readiness:strict
scripts.verify:extended: pnpm test:ui:coverage && pnpm test:fixtures && pnpm test:runtime-quality && pnpm test:product-scenarios && pnpm test:optional:e2e:web && pnpm test:optional:e2e:desktop && pnpm test:experimental
scripts.test:e2e:web:smoke: node scripts/run-optional-lane.mjs --tool pnpm --checkPackage @playwright/test --exec pnpm -- exec playwright test tests/e2e/web/smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:web:visual: node scripts/run-optional-lane.mjs --tool pnpm --checkPackage @playwright/test --exec pnpm -- exec playwright test tests/e2e/web/visual.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:web:ui: node scripts/run-optional-lane.mjs --tool pnpm --checkPackage @playwright/test --exec pnpm -- exec playwright test tests/e2e/web/smoke.spec.ts --ui
scripts.test:e2e:desktop: node scripts/run-optional-lane.mjs --tool tauri-desktop-e2e --checkPackage webdriverio --checkEnv TAURI_APP_PATH --exec pnpm -- exec wdio run tests/e2e/desktop/wdio.tauri.conf.mjs
scripts.test:perf:k6: node scripts/run-optional-lane.mjs --tool k6 --checkPath tests/perf/k6-smoke.js --exec k6 -- run tests/perf/k6-smoke.js
scripts.test:sec:zap: node scripts/run-optional-lane.mjs --tool zap-baseline --checkPath scripts/run-zap-baseline.ps1 --exec pwsh -- -File scripts/run-zap-baseline.ps1
scripts.test:ux:lighthouse: node scripts/run-optional-lane.mjs --tool lhci --checkPackage lhci --exec pnpm -- exec lhci autorun --config=./lighthouserc.json
scripts.test:quick: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test:ui
scripts.test:experimental: pnpm test:optional:perf:k6 && pnpm test:optional:sec:zap && pnpm test:optional:ux:lighthouse
scripts.test:runtime-quality: pnpm test:runtime-answer-quality:gate && pnpm test:latency-parser && pnpm test:slo-budget && pnpm test:say-now-scenarios && pnpm test:interview-quality
scripts.verify:release-local: pnpm verify:standard && pnpm test:e2e:web && pnpm test:runtime-quality && pnpm test:product-scenarios && pnpm report:runtime-quality:strict && pnpm report:release-readiness:strict
